---
title: "Chikv | Pseudobulk DESeq2 analysis"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: 2025-06-27
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  step: "05.P.compute_de"
  input_step: "03.P.integration"
  input_rds: "integrated_so.rds"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=F, warning=F, echo=T)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis,"/"))

input_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/")
input_var_dir <- paste0(input_step_dir, "results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir)) {
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
}

this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir)) {
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)
}

var_dir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/vars/")
dir.create(var_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

helpers_dir <- here::here("helpers/")
source(paste0(helpers_dir, "de_helpers.R"))
```

```{r load_input_data}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
so$timepoint <- ifelse(so$TimePoint == "A", "A", "M6")
```

```{r subsets}
subset_so <- list()
subset_so[["A"]]  <- subset(so, timepoint == "A")
subset_so[["M6"]] <- subset(so, timepoint == "M6")
subset_so[["NC"]] <- subset(so, clinical_condition == "Non-Chronic")
subset_so[["C"]]  <- subset(so, clinical_condition == "Chronic")
```

```{r prepare_results_slot}
so@misc$de <- list()
so@misc$de[["A"]]  <- list()
so@misc$de[["M6"]] <- list()
so@misc$de[["NC"]] <- list()
so@misc$de[["C"]]  <- list()
for (n in names(so@misc$de)) {
  so@misc$de[[n]]$all <- list()
  so@misc$de[[n]]$pval_filt <- list()
}
```

```{r select_genes}
so@misc$de_selgenes <- select_genes(so, verbose=T)
```

```{r prepare_pseudobulk_data}
pseudo = list()
cluster_names = list()
freqs = list()
clusters_col <- "celltype"
for (tp in c("A", "M6")) {
  pseudo[[tp]] <- AggregateExpression(subset_so[[tp]],
                    assays = "RNA", return.seurat = TRUE,
                    group.by = c("clinical_condition", "sample", clusters_col))
  clusters_data <- pseudo[[tp]]@meta.data[[clusters_col]]
  pseudo[[tp]]$cond.clusters <-
    paste0(pseudo[[tp]]$clinical_condition, "_", clusters_data)
}
for (cc in c("NC", "C")) {
  pseudo[[cc]] <- AggregateExpression(subset_so[[cc]],
                    assays = "RNA", return.seurat = TRUE,
                    group.by = c("timepoint", "sample", clusters_col))
  clusters_data <- pseudo[[cc]]@meta.data[[clusters_col]]
  pseudo[[cc]]$cond.clusters <-
    paste0(pseudo[[cc]]$timepoint, "_", clusters_data)
}
for (n in c("A", "M6", "NC", "C")) {
  Idents(pseudo[[n]]) <- "cond.clusters"
  cluster_names[[n]] <- unique(clusters_data)
  freqs[[n]] = table(Idents(pseudo[[n]]))
}
```

```{r run_de}
identpfx.1 <- list()
identpfx.2 <- list()
for (tp in c("A", "M6")) {
  identpfx.1[[tp]] <- "Chronic_"
  identpfx.2[[tp]] <- "Non-Chronic_"
}
for (cc in c("NC", "C")) {
  identpfx.1[[cc]] <- "A_"
  identpfx.2[[cc]] <- "M6_"
}
for (n in c("A", "M6", "NC", "C")) {
  for (cluster in cluster_names[[n]]) {
    ident.1 <- paste0(identpfx.1[[n]], cluster)
    ident.2 <- paste0(identpfx.2[[n]], cluster)
    results <- run_pb_deseq2(pseudo[[n]], so@misc$de_selgenes,
                             ident.1, ident.2, freqs[[n]])
    so@misc$de[[n]]$all[[cluster]] <- results$all
    so@misc$de[[n]]$pval_filt[[cluster]] <- results$pval_filt
  }
}
```

```{r prepare_pseudobulk_total_cells}
pseudo = list()
for (tp in c("A", "M6")) {
  pseudo[[tp]] <- AggregateExpression(subset_so[[tp]],
                    assays = "RNA", return.seurat = TRUE,
                    group.by = c("clinical_condition", "sample"))
  Idents(pseudo[[tp]]) <- "clinical_condition"
}
for (cc in c("NC", "C")) {
  pseudo[[cc]] <- AggregateExpression(subset_so[[cc]],
                    assays = "RNA", return.seurat = TRUE,
                    group.by = c("timepoint", "sample"))
  Idents(pseudo[[cc]]) <- "timepoint"
}
```

```{r run_de_total_cells}
cluster = "Total"
for (tp in c("A", "M6")) {
  results <- run_pb_deseq2(pseudo[[tp]], so@misc$de_selgenes,
                           "Chronic", "Non-Chronic")
  so@misc$de[[tp]]$all[[cluster]] <- results$all
  so@misc$de[[tp]]$pval_filt[[cluster]] <- results$pval_filt
}
for (cc in c("NC", "C")) {
  results <- run_pb_deseq2(pseudo[[cc]], so@misc$de_selgenes, "A", "M6")
  so@misc$de[[cc]]$all[[cluster]] <- results$all
  so@misc$de[[cc]]$pval_filt[[cluster]] <- results$pval_filt
}
```

```{r save_results}
saveRDS(so, paste0(var_dir, "so_w_deseq.rds"))
```

# Session info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
